evals.prompt: 核对我项目文件夹中2023年的审计报告和财报。项目在 /Users/martin/Documents/OpenCode/KFL审计报告/，2023年的文件在 2023/ 子目录下：有 3-审计报告正文.docx（报告）、4-财务报表模板(执行小企业会计准则)-2023.xlsx（财务报表）、5-附注模板(执行小企业会计准则)-2023.docx（附注）。请按三类核对的要求逐项检查并生成核对结果文件。
evals.expected_output: 包含核对范围、三类核对结果的Markdown文件，文件命名规则：xxx核对结果.md。单年度场景应包含跨年度衔接说明标记。

assertions.name: results-file-exists
assertions.description: 核对结果文件被创建并写入
assertions.check: output directory contains at least one .md result file

assertions.name: check1-performed
assertions.description: 核对一已执行
assertions.check: result file mentions 报告与财务报表勾稽 or similar

assertions.name: check2-bs-checked
assertions.description: 资产负债表逐项加总已验证
assertions.check: result file mentions 资产负债表, 流动资产合计, 资产总计

assertions.name: check2-pl-checked
assertions.description: 利润表分层已验证
assertions.check: result file mentions 利润表, 营业利润, 净利润

assertions.name: check2-cf-checked
assertions.description: 现金流量表分层已验证
assertions.check: result file mentions 现金流量表, 经营活动净额, 期末现金余额

assertions.name: check2-appendix-checked
assertions.description: 附注明细加总已验证
assertions.check: result file mentions 附注明细 or verifies specific notes items

assertions.name: check2-cross-table-checked
assertions.description: 跨表勾稽已验证
assertions.check: result file mentions 跨表勾稽 or 货币资金=CF期末现金

assertions.name: check3-performed
assertions.description: 错别字/语句问题已执行
assertions.check: result file mentions 错别字, 语句问题, or lists text issues

assertions.name: issue-profit-table-found
assertions.description: 发现了未分配利润表净利润不一致问题
assertions.check: result file mentions 未分配利润.*净利润 or 51,705.*-90,492

assertions.name: summary-stats-exist
assertions.description: 汇总统计已包含
assertions.check: result file contains 问题汇总 or 通过率 section

eval_result.notes: 单年度场景两版差异较小。增强版优势在于输出格式规范性和跨年度衔接说明标记。

evals.prompt: 帮我核对 /Users/martin/Documents/OpenCode/KFL审计报告/ 中2023年和2024年这两年的审计报告和财报。每个年份的目录结构类似（封面、目录、报告正文、财务报表xlsx、附注docx）。请系统性地完成核对，尤其是这两年之间的跨年度数据衔接和问题传播情况，生成一份包含两个年度核对的综合结果文件。
evals.expected_output: 包含两个年度各自的三类核对结果，以及跨年度数据衔接和问题传播检查的综合Markdown文件。必须包含：年份完整性检查、跨年度数据衔接表、跨年度问题传播分析表。

assertions.name: results-file-exists
assertions.description: 核对结果文件被创建
assertions.check: output directory contains at least one .md result file

assertions.name: both-years-present
assertions.description: 2023和2024两年的核对结果都存在
assertions.check: result file mentions both 2023 and 2024 as separate year sections

assertions.name: cross-year-data-check-exists
assertions.description: 跨年度数据衔接检查已执行
assertions.check: result file mentions 跨年度 or 数据衔接 or 上年期末=本期期初

assertions.name: cross-year-propagation-check-exists
assertions.description: 跨年度问题传播检查已执行
assertions.check: result file mentions 问题传播 or 跨年度问题 or 影响年度

assertions.name: year-completeness-check-exists
assertions.description: 年份完整性检查已执行
assertions.check: result file mentions 年份完整 or 要求核对 or 实际核对

assertions.name: summary-covers-both-years
assertions.description: 汇总统计覆盖了两个年份
assertions.check: summary section contains data for both 2023 and 2024

assertions.name: cross-year-issue-identified
assertions.description: 至少发现了一个跨年份的问题
assertions.check: result file identifies an issue that spans multiple years

assertions.name: table-header-error-in-both
assertions.description: 应收账款表头错误在两个年份都被发现
assertions.check: result file mentions 预付账款.*应收账款 or 表头.*错误 for both years

eval_result.notes: 增强版发现表头错误和繁体字两个传播问题。旧版仅独立记录各自年份的2个问题，无法识别传播模式。

evals.prompt: 请核对 /Users/martin/Documents/OpenCode/KFL审计报告/ 中2023、2024、2025连续三年的审计报告和财务报表。每个年份下都有对应的审计报告正文.docx、财务报表.xlsx和附注.docx。请严格按照先纵向（每年单独核对）再横向（跨年度检查）的流程执行，特别关注年份完整性、跨年度数据衔接和问题传播，生成全面的核对结果文件。
evals.expected_output: 包含三个年度完整的纵向核对结果+横向（年份完整性、数据衔接、问题传播、汇总交叉比对）的综合Markdown文件。必须包含：年份完整性检查表、两个衔接对的详细数据、问题传播热力图、核心数据汇总表。

assertions.name: results-file-exists
assertions.description: 核对结果文件被创建
assertions.check: output directory contains at least one .md result file

assertions.name: all-three-years-present
assertions.description: 三年核对结果都存在
assertions.check: result file mentions 2023, 2024, and 2025 as separate year sections

assertions.name: year-completeness-check-exists
assertions.description: 年份完整性检查已执行
assertions.check: result file contains year completeness check table

assertions.name: both-cross-year-transitions
assertions.description: 两个衔接对都检查了
assertions.check: result file mentions both 2023末→2024初 and 2024末→2025初

assertions.name: propagation-check-exists
assertions.description: 问题传播检查已执行
assertions.check: result file explicitly discusses propagation patterns across years

assertions.name: table-header-error-all-years
assertions.description: 表头错误被识别为三年都存在
assertions.check: result file identifies the 表头 issue as present in all three years

assertions.name: traditional-char-partial-years
assertions.description: 繁体字被识别为部分年份存在
assertions.check: result file notes that 繁体字 exists in 2023/2024 but not 2025

assertions.name: summary-covers-all-years-and-cross
assertions.description: 汇总覆盖所有三年和跨年度检查项
assertions.check: summary includes data for all three years plus cross-year items

assertions.name: priority-ordered-issues
assertions.description: 问题清单按优先级排序
assertions.check: issues list has a priority column and is ordered by priority level

assertions.name: propagation-reference-identified
assertions.description: 未分配利润问题被识别为引用传播
assertions.check: result file notes that the 2023 未分配利润 issue propagates via reference

eval_result.notes: 三年度场景差异最大化。增强版发现3类传播模式（模板/格式/引用），旧版仅独立记录各自年份问题。
